campus_layout.overview: UIC Chicago campus divides into East/South Campus (Halsted area, most undergrad buildings) and West Campus/Medical District (Wood/Damen/Polk area, health sciences). Interactive map: maps.uic.edu
campus_layout.east_campus: Runs along Halsted from Harrison south past Roosevelt. Student Center East, Daley Library, lecture centers, engineering, athletics, most undergrad housing.
campus_layout.west_campus: Illinois Medical District around Wood, Damen, Polk, Taylor. Health sciences, UI Health, Student Center West, Library of Health Sciences, professional programs.

student_services.name: Student Services Building
student_services.note: Most important student services building. One stop for all paperwork.

academic_buildings.name: Behavioral Sciences Building
academic_buildings.whats_inside: Major classroom and office building for social sciences

academic_buildings.name: Lecture Centers A-F
academic_buildings.abbreviations: LCA, LCB, LCC, LCD, LCE, LCF
academic_buildings.whats_inside: Large lecture and classroom buildings for gen ed and major courses

academic_buildings.name: Grant Hall
academic_buildings.whats_inside: Academic classrooms. Writing Center in Room 105.

academic_buildings.name: Science and Engineering South
academic_buildings.whats_inside: Science/engineering classrooms, labs. Math and Science Learning Center on 3rd floor.

academic_buildings.name: Engineering Innovation Building
academic_buildings.whats_inside: Modern engineering academic and innovation space

academic_buildings.name: Computer Design Research and Learning Center
academic_buildings.whats_inside: Computing, design, and learning spaces. Sandella's Flatbread Cafe inside.

academic_buildings.name: Education Performing Arts and Social Work Building
College of Urban Planning and Public Affairs Hall

libraries.name: Richard J. Daley Library
libraries.whats_inside: Main UIC library. General collections, group study rooms, IDEA Commons, reference help, special collections. Quiet/silent areas on Levels 1, 3, 4.
libraries.tip: Best all-around study spot on campus

libraries.name: Library of the Health Sciences - Chicago
libraries.whats_inside: Health sciences collections. Single-person study rooms. Best for medicine, nursing, pharmacy, dentistry students.

libraries.name: UIC School of Law Library (Louis L. Biro Law Library)
libraries.address: 300 S State St, downtown Chicago (6th floor)
libraries.whats_inside: Law collections and legal research. Not on main campus.

student_centers.name: Student Center East
student_centers.tip: Best all-around hangout spot. Central to east campus.

recreation.name: Student Recreation Facility
recreation.whats_inside: Main east campus rec center. 18,000 sq ft gym, pool, track, racquetball, basketball/volleyball courts.

recreation.name: Sport and Fitness Center
recreation.whats_inside: West campus rec center. Pool, gym, fitness equipment.

athletics.name: Credit Union 1 Arena (formerly UIC Pavilion)
athletics.whats_inside: Basketball and volleyball arena. 8,000 capacity for sports.

athletics.name: Flames Natatorium
athletics.address: Inside Physical Education Building, 901 W Roosevelt Rd

cta_trains.closest_to: Student Center East, Student Services Building, ARC, Daley Library, east campus
Student Services Building, Credit Union 1 Arena, ARC, west edge of east campus
College of Nursing, Library of Health Sciences, Sport and Fitness Center, Pharmacy, UI Health, west campus
College of Dentistry, UI Health medical district, west campus buildings

key_cta_buses.notes: East-west along Harrison. Best for SSB, BSB, ARC, east campus
North-south on Halsted. Best for SCE, Burnham, Addams, Daley, south campus housing
Along Roosevelt Road. Best for south campus, athletics, JST, TBH
Connects downtown rail to campus. Harrison/Taylor corridor
Taylor Street corridor and medical district
West campus via Illinois Medical District station

intracampus_route.description: Links east and west campus via Roosevelt/Harrison. Valid UIC i-card required.
intracampus_route.hours: Mon-Fri 7AM-6PM every 30 min, then 6PM-11PM every 60 min. Weekends/holidays 7AM-11PM every 60 min.

semester_express.description: Express from south side residence halls to east and west campus via Harrison. Mon-Fri only.
semester_express.hours: Mon-Fri 7AM-3PM every 30 min. Does NOT run weekends, holidays, or breaks.

night_ride.description: On-demand van service after hours. Request via UIC Ride app.
night_ride.coverage: North: Congress Pkwy, South: Roosevelt, East: Union, West: Western. Also serves UIC Law downtown.

shuttles.app: UIC Ride app — track all routes and schedule Night Ride

divvy_bikes.discount: UIC students/faculty/staff get discounted annual memberships using UIC email
divvy_bikes.low_income: Divvy for Everyone: $5/year for unlimited 45-minute rides (for federal aid recipients)
divvy_bikes.nearby_stations: SSB at Racine and Harrison, Peoria and Harrison, Peoria and Jackson

parking.value_card: Occasional parkers: $9/visit at designated visitor lots

east_campus_garages.name: Harrison Street Parking Structure (HSPS)
east_campus_garages.best_for: SSB, Admissions, Financial Aid, Registrar, ARC

east_campus_garages.name: Halsted Taylor Parking Structure (HLPS)
east_campus_garages.best_for: Student Center East, Daley Library, lecture centers

east_campus_garages.name: Maxwell Street Parking Structure (MSPS)
east_campus_garages.best_for: South campus housing and athletics. First 2 hours $3.

west_campus_garages.name: Wood Street Parking Structure (WSPS)
west_campus_garages.best_for: Library of Health Sciences, Pharmacy, UI Health Specialty Care

bursar.location: Main: 210 MAB, 809 S Marshfield. Cashiers: 111 MAB. Student accounts: 1900 SSB

math_science_learning_center_MSLC.location: 3rd floor, Science and Engineering South (SES), 845 W Taylor St

quick_navigation.for_undergrad_paperwork: Go to SSB (1200 W Harrison) — Registrar, Financial Aid, Admissions, Dean of Students, Career Services, OIS, DRC all here
quick_navigation.for_studying: Daley Library (east campus) or LHS (west campus)
quick_navigation.for_health_sciences: West campus — LHS, Nursing, Dentistry, Pharmacy, UI Health
quick_navigation.best_train_west_campus: Blue Line Illinois Medical District or Pink Line Polk
quick_navigation.best_parking_west_campus: Paulina or Wood Street Parking Structure
